name: Suspicious Parent of Csc Detected
description: Detection of `csc.exe` (C# compiler) being launched by a suspicious parent process like `wscript.exe`, `cscript.exe`, or `mshta.exe`. This is a strong indicator of a payload delivery attempt, where an adversary is using a legitimate utility to compile and execute malicious code to evade security defenses.

prompts.prompt: A critical alert has been triggered on the host **{host}**: the process **`csc.exe`** was launched by a suspicious parent process, **{parent_image}**. This is a strong indicator of a **Payload Delivery** attempt and **Defense Evasion** (**MITRE ATT&CK T1036**). Adversaries often use legitimate utilities like `csc.exe` to compile and execute malicious code. Immediate investigation is required to determine the legitimacy of this action and to remove the malicious process. The event occurred under the user **{user}**.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The name of the host where the event occurred.

parameters.name: parent_image
parameters.description: The name of the parent process that launched csc.exe.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account that performed the action.
